ingredients_string: Blueberries:20 | Cinnamon:1 | Coconut Chia Pudding (Base):75 | Fresh Mint:1 | Walnuts:5
short_description: Creamy coconut chia pudding with blueberries, walnuts, cinnamon, and mint.
instructions:
Prepare Coconut Chia Pudding (Base) ahead (chia, coconut milk, and date syrup) and chill until thick.
Spoon the set pudding into a bowl or jar.
Fold in blueberries, walnuts, cinnamon, and mint.
Serve chilled.

ingredients_string: Avocado:20 | Basil:5 | Bell Pepper (Red):30 | Black Pepper:1 | Egg:100 | Kalamata Olives:12 | Olive Oil (Extra Virgin):6 | Parsley:5 | Shallots:20 | Thyme (Fresh):2 | Tomato (Raw):30
short_description: Earthy and rich in B-vitamins for morning mental clarity.
instructions:
1. Beat eggs in a bowl.
2. Sauté diced pepper, tomato, and shallot in olive oil for 3 minutes.
3. Pour in eggs. Cook over medium heat until almost set.
4. Add olives and avocado on one half. Fold omelet in half.
5. Finish with fresh herbs. Serve warm.

meal_name: Tamarind Honey & Sesame Chicken w Garlicky Green Beans
ingredients_string: Broccoli:60 | Chicken Breast:110 | Cucumber Pickle (Base):25 | Garlic (Raw):3 | Garlicky Green Beans (Base):85 | Ginger (Raw):2 | Honey (Raw):5 | Rice Vinegar:4 | Sea Salt:1 | Sesame Oil:7 | Sesame Seeds:2 | Spring Onion:20 | Tamarind Paste:30
short_description: Baked chicken thighs glazed in tamarind honey sauce, with garlicky green beans and broccoli.
instructions:
1. Combine tamarind paste, honey, rice vinegar, sesame oil, crushed garlic, grated ginger, salt, and spring onion pieces in a jug.
2. Marinate chicken breast in the sauce overnight.
3. Preheat oven. Bake 25 minutes until cooked through (74°C internal).
4. Sprinkle chicken with finely sliced spring onion. Combine tray juices with leftover marinade and drizzle over liberally.
5. Serve with steamed broccoli, cucumber pickle, and Garlicky Green Beans (Base) sprinkled with sesame seeds and spring onion.

meal_name: Rosemary Garlic Chicken w Mushroom, Spinach & Roasted Sweet Potato
ingredients_string: Black Pepper:0.5 | Mushrooms:45 | Olive Oil (Extra Virgin):4 | Rosemary Garlic Chicken (Base):120 | Spinach (Fresh):55 | Sweet Potato:85
short_description: Grilled rosemary garlic chicken with sautéed mushrooms and spinach over roasted sweet potato wedges.
instructions:
1. Toss sweet potato wedges with half the olive oil, salt, and pepper. Roast at 200°C for 22–25 minutes until golden.
2. Grill or pan-sear Rosemary Garlic Chicken (Base) until 74°C internal. Rest and slice.
3. Sauté mushrooms in remaining olive oil until golden. Wilt spinach briefly in the same pan.
4. Plate roasted sweet potato, spinach, and mushrooms. Top with sliced chicken and serve warm.

meal_name: Baked Salmon with Fermented Chimichurri & Steamed Basmati Rice
ingredients_string: Broccoli:60 | Fermented Chimichurri (Base):22 | Salmon:150 | Steamed Basmati Rice (Base):75
short_description: Premium baked salmon with fermented chimichurri over fluffy steamed basmati rice and broccoli.
instructions:
1. Prepare Steamed Basmati Rice (Base) and keep warm.
2. Coat salmon generously with Fermented Chimichurri (Base).
3. Bake at 190°C for 12–15 minutes until flaky.
4. Steam or roast broccoli until bright green and tender.
5. Plate basmati rice and broccoli. Top with salmon and extra chimichurri if desired.

meal_name: Vegan Butternut Squash, Lentil & Peanut Stew w Brown Rice
ingredients_string: Basmati Rice (Brown):45 | Bell Pepper (Red):30 | Black Pepper:0.5 | Butternut Squash:60 | Cabbage (Purple):16 | Cherry Tomatoes:10 | Chili Flakes:0.5 | Fresh Coriander:4 | Garlic (Raw):2 | Lentils (Red):40 | Lime Juice:3 | Mushrooms:30 | Olive Oil:3 | Peanut Butter:10 | Peanuts (Crushed):15 | Red Onion:30 | Sea Salt:0.5 | Spinach (Fresh):16 | Tomato (Raw):80 | Vegetable Stock:48 | Water (Filtered):144 | Zucchini:30
short_description: A rich plant-based stew with red lentils, peanut butter, and crushed peanuts over brown rice.
instructions:
1. Cook brown rice. Keep warm.
2. Fry finely chopped onion in olive oil for 5 minutes until soft. Grate in garlic and stir.
3. Add chopped tomatoes and cook for a couple of minutes. Add water, rinsed red lentils, chopped red pepper, and butternut squash cubes. Bring to the boil, then reduce to a simmer.
4. Stir in vegetable stock and peanut butter until combined. Add zucchini and simmer for 20 minutes.
5. Add mushrooms and spinach–cabbage greens. Simmer a couple of minutes until wilted. Season with sea salt, black pepper, and chilli flakes.
6. Serve stew over brown rice. Top with fresh coriander, cherry tomatoes, crushed peanuts, and lime juice.

meal_name: Marinated Pineapple, Peppers, Red Onion & Cilantro Side Salad
ingredients_string: Bell Pepper (Red):25 | Cabbage (Purple):45 | Cucumber:35 | Fresh Coriander:4 | Pineapple:111 | Red Onion:12 | Red Thai Chillies:2 | Zesty Lime Chili Salad Dressing (Base):10
short_description: A tropical side salad combining pineapple chunks
instructions:
Dice pineapple, pepper, cucumber, and red onion.
Toss with thinly sliced cabbage and fresh coriander.
Refrigerate 15–30 minutes so the vegetables soften slightly.
Add chilli just before serving.
Drizzle with dressing and toss gently.

ingredients_string: Carrots:50 | Classic Lemon Garlic Dressing (Base):15 | Cucumber:60 | Romaine Lettuce:50 | Tomato (Raw):60
short_description: A crisp
instructions:
Wash and chop the lettuce, tomato, cucumber, pepper, cabbage, and onion.
Toss the vegetables together in a large bowl.
Drizzle with dressing and toss until evenly coated.
Serve immediately.

ingredients_string: Almond Flour (Base):500 | Carrots:200 | Cinnamon:16 | Coconut Cream:160 | Coconut Flour:64 | Date Syrup:60 | Egg:298 | Nutmeg:4 | Olive Oil (Extra Virgin):90 | Raisins:50 | Walnuts:50
short_description: Moist gluten-free carrot cake batch (8 slices) with almond and coconut flours, walnuts, raisins, warm spices, date syrup, and ghee.
instructions:
1. Heat oven to 175°C (350°F). Grease a baking pan with ghee.
2. Whisk eggs, date syrup, melted ghee, and coconut cream until smooth.
3. Fold in grated carrots, almond flour, tapioca starch, coconut flour, cinnamon, nutmeg, walnuts, and raisins.
4. Pour into the pan. Bake 30–35 minutes until set and golden.
5. Cool, then cut into 8 equal slices. One slice is one serving.

ingredients_string: Apple Green:40 | Blueberries:40 | Fresh Mint:3 | Honey (Raw):1 | Lemon Juice:5 | Pineapple:40 | Pomegranate Seeds:30 | Strawberries:50
short_description: A clean refreshing side array of sliced strawberries
instructions:
1. Wash and chop all fruit into bite-size pieces.
2. Toss gently with lemon juice and honey if using.
3. Chill 15 minutes. Serve cold.

ingredients_string: Garlic:3 | Homemade Coconut Milk:25 | Mushrooms:200 | Olive Oil:3 | Thyme (Fresh):3 | Turmeric Powder:2 | Vegetable Stock:2.5 | Water (Filtered):147.5 | White Onion:30
short_description: A rich creamy plant-based umami soup combining sautéed wild mushrooms and garlic blended with coconut cream
instructions:
1. Sauté onion and mushrooms in oil until browned (8 min).
2. Add garlic, thyme, and turmeric. Cook 1 minute.
3. Pour in stock and coconut milk. Simmer 15 minutes.
4. Blend partially for a creamy texture, or leave chunky.
5. Serve hot.

ingredients_string: Bone Broth (Base):500
short_description: 500 ml cup of defatted house bone broth — long-simmered and gelatin-rich.
instructions:
1. Measure 500 ml (one serving) of defatted Bone Broth (Base).
2. Pour into a small pot.
3. Heat gently on the stove until steaming (do not boil hard).
4. Pour into a mug or bowl and serve hot.

ingredients_string: Almond Butter:10 | Almond whole:5 | Cocoa Powder:2 | Coconut Chia Pudding (Base):75
short_description: Rich cacao coconut chia pudding swirled with almond butter and almonds.
instructions:
Prepare Coconut Chia Pudding (Base) ahead (chia, coconut milk, and date syrup) and chill until thick.
Spoon the set pudding into a bowl or jar.
Swirl in almond butter and cocoa powder. Top with chopped almonds.
Serve chilled.

ingredients_string: Egg:100 | Fresh Coriander:4 | Smashed White Beans (Base):80 | Tomato (Raw):50
short_description: Creamy white beans topped with a perfectly crispy fried egg.
instructions:
1. Prepare Smashed White Beans (Base) per base recipe instructions.
2. Dice tomato and chop fresh coriander.
3. Fry or poach eggs until whites are set and yolks are runny.
4. Spoon warm smashed beans onto plates, top with eggs, tomato, and coriander.
5. Serve immediately.

ingredients_string: Chicken thigh:500 | Coconut Milk:400 | Fish Sauce:15 | Jasmine Rice:200 | Palm sugar:8 | Thai basil:10
short_description: Rich red curry with coconut milk and tender chicken over jasmine rice.
instructions:
Sear cubed chicken thighs in a large heavy pot until completely golden on all sides.
Pour rich coconut milk and house red curry paste over the chicken elements.
Season with fish sauce and palm sugar; bring to a rolling simmer over medium heat for 15 minutes.
Toss fresh Thai basil leaves into the hot curry base 60 seconds before removing from heat source.
Portion jasmine rice into bulk catering containers and ladle chicken curry matrix evenly over the top.

meal_name: Crispy Chicken Tikka bowl w Quinoa & Mint Sauce
ingredients_string: Apple Cider Vinegar:5 | Cabbage (Purple):30 | Carrots:20 | Cashew Cream (Base):15 | Cashew Nuts:10 | Cucumber:30 | Fresh Coriander:5 | Fresh Mint:5 | Lime Juice:5 | Quinoa (White):30 | Red Onion:15 | Tandoori Chicken (Base):95 | Tomato (Raw):60 | White Onion:40
short_description: Crispy chicken tikka over clean white quinoa with cashew mint sauce.
instructions:
Cook quinoa: rinse, simmer 15 minutes, fluff.
Grill or crisp Tandoori Chicken (Base) until golden; slice.
Shred cabbage; julienne carrots and cucumber.
Layer quinoa, vegetables, and chicken. Drizzle cashew mint sauce and lime.

meal_name: Leek & Salmon in Capers, Lemon & Dill Sauce w Roasted Potato
ingredients_string: Black Pepper:2 | Capers:12 | Dill (Fresh):8 | Garlic (Raw):6 | Leeks:144 | Lemon Juice:36 | Olive Oil (Extra Virgin):24 | Potato:192 | Preserved Lemon:12 | Rosemary (Fresh):2 | Salmon:328 | Sea Salt:2 | Vegetable Broth (Base):40
short_description: Tender parchment-baked salmon fillets over sautéed leeks, with herb-roasted potato cubes.
instructions:
Preheat oven to 200°C. Toss potato cubes with olive oil, minced garlic, fresh rosemary, and sea salt; roast for 25 minutes.
Sauté julienned leeks in olive oil over medium heat for 6 to 8 minutes until sweet and golden.
Prepare a large greaseproof paper parchment square and layer the sautéed leeks down in the center core.
Lay the clean salmon fillet over the leek bed; season with black pepper, capers, preserved lemon, and fresh dill.
Spoon house vegetable broth base and lemon juice over the salmon, wrap paper tightly to trap steam, and bake for 15 minutes.

meal_name: Harissa Chicken Balls w Couscous Cucumber Herb Salad & Eggplant Dip
ingredients_string: Black Pepper:1 | Chicken Breast:150 | Couscous:30 | Cucumber:60 | Dill (Fresh):3 | Eggplant Dip (Mutabal) (Base):40 | Fresh Mint:3 | Garlic (Raw):6 | Harissa Paste:15 | Lemon Juice:15 | Olive Oil (Extra Virgin):4 | Parsley:5 | Red Onion:8 | Sea Salt:1 | White Onion:15
short_description: Harissa chicken meatballs with a cucumber-herb salad, fluffy couscous, and mutabal eggplant dip.
instructions:
Mix ground chicken meat with harissa paste, garlic, white onion, parsley, dill, mint, and sea salt; roll into uniform meatballs.
Sear meatballs in a hot cast-iron skillet with olive oil until golden, then bake at 200°C for 12 minutes until cooked through.
Toss diced cucumber, fresh lemon juice, chopped red onion, and fresh mint together to assemble the salad.
Prepare couscous according to package guidelines until light and fluffy.
Layer couscous into container base, arrange meatballs and cucumber salad neatly adjacent, and accompany with a side of house mutabal dip.

meal_name: Vegan Smoky Cauliflower & Lentil Stew w Quinoa Bread & Tahini
ingredients_string: Carrots:30 | Cauliflower:100 | Cherry Tomatoes:38 | Chili Flakes:1 | Coriander Seeds:1 | Cumin Seeds:2 | Garlic (Raw):3 | Lemon Juice:10 | Lentils (Red):80 | Olive Oil (Extra Virgin):4 | Quinoa Bread (Base):29.25 | Smoked Paprika:2 | Tahini:12 | Vegetable Stock:1.875 | Water (Filtered):125.625 | White Onion:28
short_description: Smoky red lentil and cauliflower stew with a rich lemon-tahini drizzle.
instructions:
1. Roast cauliflower florets at 200°C for 20 minutes until golden.
2. Simmer lentils with aromatics and stock until tender.
3. Combine roasted cauliflower with lentils. Season with smoked paprika.
4. Warm quinoa bread. Drizzle tahini over stew.
5. Serve hot.

ingredients_string: Almond Flour (Base):144 | Cocoa Powder:60.8 | Coconut Oil:108.8 | Date Syrup:144 | Sea Salt:9.6 | Tahini:120 | Vanilla Pods:1.6
short_description: Three-layer 8x8 no-bake bar (16 squares): almond shortbread, salted tahini-date caramel, and dark cocoa topping.
instructions:
1. Heat oven to 175°C. Line an 8x8 inch pan with parchment paper.
2. Mix almond flour, 3 tablespoons coconut oil, 2 tablespoons date syrup, vanilla, and salt into a crumb. Press evenly into the pan and bake 10 minutes. Cool 10 minutes.
3. Warm tahini, date syrup, coconut oil, vanilla, and sea salt in a saucepan over medium-low heat for about 2 minutes, stirring often. Pour over the crust.
4. Refrigerate 30 to 60 minutes until the caramel layer sets.
5. Whisk cocoa powder, remaining coconut oil, and a little date syrup until smooth and glossy.
6. Pour the chocolate layer over the caramel, tilt the pan to coat evenly, and chill 1 hour until firm. Sprinkle with flaky sea salt.
7. Lift from the pan and cut into 16 squares. One square is one serving.

ingredients_string: Almond Flour (Base):444 | Cocoa Powder:180 | Egg:552 | Honey (Raw):120 | Olive Oil:84 | Orange Juice:252 | Orange Zest:30 | Walnuts:120
short_description: Rich flourless cocoa-orange brownie batch (24 small squares) with house almond flour, eggs, honey, olive oil, and walnuts.
instructions:
1. Heat oven to 175°C. Line a small tin.
2. Whisk eggs with orange juice, zest, honey, and olive oil.
3. Fold in almond flour, cocoa powder, and chopped walnuts until combined.
4. Pour into tin. Bake until a skewer comes out mostly clean.
5. Cool, then cut into 24 equal small squares. One square is one serving.

meal_name: Vegan Harissa Roasted Cauliflower & Chickpea Salad w Tahini Dressing
ingredients_string: Cauliflower:150 | Chickpeas:75 | Dill (Fresh):2 | Fresh Mint:3 | Harissa Paste (Base):1.75 | Lemon-Tahini Dressing (Base):35 | Olive Oil (Extra Virgin):5 | Shallots:20
short_description: Smoky harissa-roasted cauliflower and crispy chickpeas with velvety lemon-tahini dressing.
instructions:
Toss cauliflower and chickpeas with harissa and oil.
Roast at 200°C for 25 minutes until crisp.
Toss roasted vegetables with herbs and dressing.
Serve warm or at room temperature.

meal_name: Eggplant & Ground Beef Stew w Quinoa Bread
ingredients_string: Avocado Oil:4 | Beef Ground:80 | Black Pepper:1 | Chili Flakes:1 | Eggplant:90 | Garlic (Raw):5 | Ginger (Raw):3 | Parsley:2 | Quinoa Bread (Base):45 | Sea Salt:1 | Sesame Oil:3 | Soy Sauce:8 | White Onion:20
short_description: Comforting skillet stir-fry of tender eggplant cubes and lean ground beef with a slice of rustic quinoa bread.
instructions:
Heat avocado oil in a heavy stainless steel skillet. Add eggplant cubes and stir-fry for 7 minutes until soft and golden; remove.
Add remaining oil to the skillet and input ground beef; cook for 8 minutes until entirely browned and crumbly.
Stir in chopped white onion, minced raw garlic, and grated ginger; sauté over medium-high heat for 3 minutes until highly fragrant.
Return browned eggplant cubes to the skillet, pour in soy sauce and sesame oil, and sprinkle with chili flakes.
Sauté for 3 minutes to emulsify layout; serve hot with fresh parsley garnish and a toasted slice of house quinoa bread base.

ingredients_string: Bell Pepper (Red):45 | Broccoli:50 | Cherry Tomato:40 | Cilantro Lime Dressing (Base):22 | Fresh Coriander:3 | Garlic (Raw):3 | Mushrooms:110 | Quinoa:35 | Spinach (Fresh):25 | White Onion:20
short_description: Vibrant plant bowl featuring sautéed Portobello mushrooms
instructions: fluffy quinoa

meal_name: Spicy Harissa Grilled Chicken w Roasted Sweet Potato & Zucchini
ingredients_string: Black Pepper:0.5 | Chicken Breast:110 | Garlic (Raw):3 | Harissa Paste (Base):6.3 | Lemon Juice:10 | Olive Oil (Extra Virgin):4 | Sweet Potato:90 | Zucchini:80
short_description: Lean chicken breast marinated in house harissa paste
instructions:
1. Coat chicken with harissa and a little olive oil. Rest 15 minutes.
2. Cube sweet potato and zucchini. Toss with oil. Roast at 200°C for 25 minutes.
3. Grill or pan-sear chicken until cooked through.
4. Rest, slice, and serve over roasted vegetables.

meal_name: Grilled Beef Steak Ratatouille & Saffron rice
ingredients_string: Beef Sirloin:85 | Bell Pepper (Red):40 | Black Pepper:1 | Eggplant:40 | Fresh Basil:5 | Garlic (Raw):3 | Lemon Juice:10 | Olive Oil (Extra Virgin):4 | Parsley:5 | Saffron Rice (Base):75 | Tomato (Raw):50 | Zucchini:45
short_description: Seared lean sirloin steak over rich
instructions:
1. Warm Saffron Rice (Base) per base recipe instructions.
2. Sauté diced eggplant, zucchini, pepper, and tomato until soft (12–15 min). Stir in basil.
3. Season steak. Sear in a hot pan 3–4 minutes per side for medium-rare (adjust to taste).
4. Rest steak 5 minutes. Slice against the grain.
5. Serve steak with vegetable medley and rice.

ingredients_string: Black Pepper:5 | Cannellini Beans:1000 | Garlic (Raw):10 | Lemon Juice:80 | Olive Oil (Extra Virgin):100 | Sea Salt:15 | Water (Filtered):3000
short_description: Silky white beans slowly simmered and infused with garlic and olive oil emulsion.
instructions:
Soak dry cannellini beans in 4 liters of filtered water for 12 hours; drain and rinse thoroughly under clean lines.
Place soaked beans in a large pot with 3 liters of fresh water; bring to a boil, then reduce heat to a very low simmer for 60 minutes.
Once bean bodies are perfectly tender, remove from heat source and drain out excess liquid layers.
Stir in sautéed garlic, sea salt, black pepper, and fresh lemon juice while the bean matrix is completely hot.
Stream extra virgin olive oil slowly into the pot while folding gently; smash 20% of the bean base with a wooden mallet to finish.

meal_name: Roasted Chicken in Pomegranate & Sumac Sauce w Turmeric Rice
ingredients_string: Chicken Breast:110 | Parsley:5 | Pomegranate Seeds:12 | Pomegranate Sumac Sauce (Base):28 | Red Onion:25 | Turmeric Rice (Base):75
short_description: Oven-roasted chicken breast in a tart pomegranate-sumac reduction over golden turmeric basmati rice.
instructions:
1. Warm Turmeric Rice (Base) per base recipe instructions.
2. Season chicken. Roast or pan-sear until cooked through.
3. Warm Pomegranate Sumac Sauce (Base) in a small pan (do not boil).
4. Slice chicken. Serve over rice with sauce spooned on top.

meal_name: Vegan Sri Lankan Red Lentil Dal w Quinoa Bread
ingredients_string: Chili Flakes:1 | Chili Powder:1 | Coriander Seeds:1 | Garlic (Raw):4 | Ginger (Raw):6 | Homemade Coconut Milk:35 | Lentils (Red):70 | Olive Oil (Extra Virgin):4 | Quinoa Bread (Base):29.25 | Tomato (Raw):35 | Turmeric Powder:1 | Water (Filtered):150 | White Onion:25 | cumin powder:1 | mustard seeds:1

instructions:
1. Rinse red lentils. Simmer with water, turmeric, and ginger until soft (20 min).
2. Sauté onion, garlic, and spices in oil. Stir into lentils.
3. Simmer 5 more minutes until creamy.
4. Warm quinoa bread. Serve dal with bread and fresh coriander.

meal_name: Tomato Parsely Salad w Sumac Za’ater Dressing
ingredients_string: Cucumber:40 | Fresh Mint:3 | Parsley:10 | Pomegranate Seeds:12 | Red Onion:13 | Sumac Za'atar Dressing (Base):10.85 | Tomato (Raw):150
short_description: A vibrant side salad featuring halved plum tomatoes and sliced red onions tossed with fresh parsley in a zesty za'atar dressing.
instructions:
Halve or wedge the tomatoes; slice cucumber and red onion.
Chop the parsley and mint.
Combine tomatoes, cucumber, onion, herbs, and pomegranate in a bowl.
Add dressing and toss gently. Serve at room temperature.

ingredients_string: Almond Butter:15 | Apple Green:25 | Cinnamon:2 | Honey (Raw):5 | Medjool Dates:35 | Walnuts:12
short_description: No-bake whole-food dessert balls combining rolled oats
instructions:
1. Mix chopped apple, nuts, and spices with binder from recipe.
2. Roll into bite-size balls.
3. Chill 30 minutes until firm. Serve cold.

meal_name: Garlic Lemon Salmon, Dill Tarragon Rice & Spicy Green Chilli Sauce
ingredients_string: Basmati Rice (White):35 | Black Pepper:1 | Dill (Fresh):10 | Garlic (Raw):6 | Lemon Juice:15 | Olive Oil (Extra Virgin):4 | Salmon (Raw):130 | Spicy Green Chilli Sauce (Base):15
short_description: Tender garlic-lemon salmon fillet over fluffy dill-tarragon basmati rice with a fiery green chilli sauce on the side.
instructions:
Cook white basmati rice according to package directions; fluff with a fork and fold in fresh chopped dill and dried tarragon strands.
Whisk extra virgin olive oil, fresh lemon juice, minced garlic, oregano, sweet paprika, and black pepper into a smooth marinade.
Lay clean salmon fillet into a baking dish, coat thoroughly with garlic-lemon marinade, and crest with fresh lemon wheels.
Bake at 200°C for 14 minutes until salmon flakes cleanly under light pressure testing parameters.
Plate salmon over aromatic herb rice bed, garnish with fresh parsley, and ladle spicy green chilli sauce into a secure side cup.

meal_name: Blackened Salmon w Sun Dried Tomato, Green Peas & Turmeric Rice
ingredients_string: Bell Pepper (Red):15 | Dill (Fresh):2 | Green Peas:20 | Olive Oil (Extra Virgin):4 | Salmon (Raw):130 | Sun-dried Tomato:10 | Turmeric Rice (Base):120
short_description: Blackened salmon fillet over a savory turmeric basmati rice base tossed with green peas and sun-dried tomatoes.
instructions:
Heat a splash of olive oil in a pot; sauté diced red onions, bell peppers, and sliced sun-dried tomatoes for 5 minutes until soft.
Add basmati rice and ground turmeric, toasting grains for 2 minutes before pouring in filtered vegetable broth and green peas.
Simmer rice on low heat covered for 15 minutes until liquid fields are completely absorbed; fluff gently.
Rub clean salmon fillet with heavy blackened spice rub (paprika, garlic powder, black pepper, cayenne) and a brush of oil.
Sear salmon in a blazing hot skillet for 4 minutes per side until dark spice crust forms; layer neatly over turmeric rice base.

meal_name: Pepper Chicken in Creamy Cajun Sauce w Roasted Potato
ingredients_string: Bell Pepper (Red):40 | Black Pepper:1 | Cajun Powder:2 | Cherry Tomatoes:30 | Chicken Breast:115 | Garlic (Raw):4 | Homemade Coconut Milk:25 | Lime Juice:8 | Olive Oil (Extra Virgin):5 | Potato:90 | Red Onion:15 | Smoked Paprika:1
short_description: Skillet-seared Cajun chicken breast in a rich coconut cream sauce with roasted cherry tomatoes and crisp potato cubes.

2. Sear chicken strips in a hot pan until browned.
3. Add sliced peppers and Cajun spice. Cook 2 minutes.
4. Stir in homemade coconut milk. Simmer until sauce thickens.
5. Serve chicken and sauce over roasted potatoes.

ingredients_string: Bell Pepper (Red):40 | Cajun Powder:1 | Chicken Breast:120 | Honey Mustard Dressing (Base):6.75 | Kale:40 | Quinoa (White):30 | Red Onion:20 | Smoked Paprika:1
short_description: Warm salad featuring sliced blackened Cajun chicken
instructions:
Cook quinoa and let cool slightly.
Rub chicken with Cajun spice. Grill or pan-sear until done. Rest and slice.
Grill pepper strips and onion until charred and soft.
Massage kale with a little dressing until tender.
Toss quinoa, kale, and vegetables with dressing. Top with chicken.

short_description: Tropical coconut chia pudding topped with fresh mango and pumpkin seeds.
instructions:
Prepare Coconut Chia Pudding (Base) ahead (chia, coconut milk, and date syrup) and chill until thick.
Spoon the set pudding into a bowl or jar.
Top with diced mango and pumpkin seeds.

short_description: A premium pan-seared salmon fillet glazed in a bright

ingredients_string: Apple Cider Vinegar:4 | Broccoli:60 | Chicken Breast:120 | Fresh Coriander:8 | Garlic (Raw):4 | Lemon Juice:10 | Olive Oil (Extra Virgin):7 | Parsley:8 | Sweet Potato:85
short_description: Juicy grilled chicken breast topped with our bright

3. Rest chicken 5 minutes, then slice.

short_description: A rich

1. Cook wild rice according to package. Keep warm.
2. Dice mango, pepper, and cucumber. Mix with lime and coriander for salsa.

4. Serve salmon over rice with mango salsa on top.

short_description: A golden pan-baked salmon fillet crusted with a dense

instructions: chicken breast strips

short_description: Juicy strawberries and tender cubed beets marinated in raw apple cider vinegar
instructions:
Cook beetroot until tender. Cool and dice.
Slice strawberries and onion.

ingredients_string: Broccoli:60 | Fermented Chimichurri (Base):22 | Salmon:125 | Steamed Basmati Rice (Base):75
short_description: Premium baked salmon with fermented chimichurri over fluffy steamed basmati rice and broccoli.
instructions:
Prepare Steamed Basmati Rice (Base) and keep warm.
Coat salmon generously with Fermented Chimichurri (Base).
Bake at 190°C for 12–15 minutes until flaky.
Steam or roast broccoli until bright green and tender.
Plate basmati rice and broccoli. Top with salmon and extra chimichurri if desired.
